scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @localstudio/landing && npm run build --workspace @localstudio/editor && npm run build --workspace @localstudio/joystick && node scripts/prepare-pages-artifacts.mjs
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @localstudio/brand && npm run typecheck --workspace @localstudio/presenter-remote && npm run typecheck --workspace @localstudio/landing && npm run typecheck --workspace @localstudio/editor && npm run typecheck --workspace @localstudio/joystick
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @localstudio/landing && npm run test --workspace @localstudio/editor && npm run test --workspace @localstudio/joystick
scripts.test:e2e:coverage:editor: E2E_COVERAGE_SCOPE=editor playwright test --project=chromium tests/e2e/editor tests/e2e/public-deck tests/e2e/webmcp
